  • Method Details

    • getDescriptor

      public Descriptor getDescriptor(IInternalElement element)
      Gets the Descriptor corresponding to the given element. Returns null if such a Descriptor does not exist.
      Specified by:
      getDescriptor in interface IRodinIndex
      Parameters:
      element -
      Returns:
      the Descriptor of the given element, or null if it does not exist.
      See Also:
      • makeDescriptor(IDeclaration)

    • getDescriptors

      public Collection<Descriptor> getDescriptors()
      Specified by:
      getDescriptors in interface IRodinIndex

    • makeDescriptor

      public Descriptor makeDescriptor(IDeclaration declaration)
      Creates a Descriptor for the given element, with the given name. Throws IllegalArgumentException if a Descriptor already exists for the element.
      Parameters:
      declaration - the declaration of the element for which to make a Descriptor.
      Returns:
      the newly created Descriptor.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the Descriptor already exists.
      See Also:
      • getDescriptor(IInternalElement)

    • removeDescriptor

      public void removeDescriptor(IInternalElement element)
